productDisplayName: Esprit Men Gran Orbus Black Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Gran Orbit analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Metallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with a tang clasp Black dial with hour markings using illuminator strips, date aperture between 4 and 5 o& rsquo clock marking Mini dials showing hours, minutes and seconds Tachymeter on the bezel Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and date Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant, allowing you to use it even when swimming
